name: Pu'u Ualaka'a (Tantalus Sunset)
tagline: The best free sunset view over Honolulu — Waikiki, Diamond Head, and Pearl Harbor all at once.
bestTime: Sunset — arrive 30 min before for parking and a good spot
talkStory: Drive up Round Top Dr — the winding road through the rainforest is scenic itself. Bring a light jacket, it's always windier and cooler up here than in town. Don't leave valuables visible in your car. The lookout is a short walk from the parking lot, not a real hike. Combine with the Makiki Valley Loop trail nearby if you want actual hiking.
